# Antek Automation

> AI automation company based in Andover, Hampshire providing AI voice assistants, chatbots, and workflow automation for UK businesses.

## Services

- [AI Voice Assistants](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-voice-assistants): 24/7 AI phone agents that answer calls, book appointments, capture details, and transfer urgent calls for UK businesses across hospitality, trades, dental, and legal sectors.
- [AI Chatbots](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/ai-chatbots): Custom-trained website chatbots that answer questions, capture leads, book appointments, and qualify prospects. Handles ~80% of conversations autonomously.
- [Workflow Automation](https://www.antekautomation.com/services/workflow-automation): Business process automation built on n8n (open source) connecting 400+ tools including Google Workspace, Xero, Stripe, HubSpot, Slack, and WhatsApp. Saves 10-20 hours/week.

## About

- [About](https://www.antekautomation.com/about): About Antek Automation and founder Andy Norman. 30+ years in technology, Certified Retell AI Partner, FSB member. Based in Andover, Hampshire.
- [Homepage](https://www.antekautomation.com): Overview of AI automation services with case studies showing 95% reduction in missed calls, 3-day ROI payback, and £5K/month admin savings.
- [Contact](https://www.antekautomation.com/contact): Contact form, phone (03330 389960), email (hello@antekautomation.com), office location in Andover, Hampshire.

## Locations

- [London](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/london): AI automation services for London businesses.
- [Hampshire](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/hampshire): Headquarters in Andover serving Hampshire businesses including Southampton, Winchester, Basingstoke.
- [Birmingham](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/birmingham): AI automation services for Birmingham and West Midlands businesses.
- [Manchester](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/manchester): AI automation services for Manchester and Greater Manchester businesses.
- [Glasgow](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/glasgow): AI automation services for Glasgow and Scottish businesses.
- [Leeds](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/leeds): AI automation services for Leeds and West Yorkshire businesses.
- [Liverpool](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/liverpool): AI automation services for Liverpool and Merseyside businesses.
- [Newcastle](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/newcastle): AI automation services for Newcastle and North East businesses.
- [Southampton](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/southampton): AI automation services for Southampton businesses.
- [Andover](https://www.antekautomation.com/locations/andover): Local AI automation services from Antek Automation's headquarters.

## Key Facts

- Headquarters: Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover, Hampshire, SP10 1LZ
- Phone: 03330 389960
- Founder: Andy Norman (30+ years in technology)
- Certified Retell AI Partner
- Services start from £500+
- Industries served: Hospitality, dental, legal, accounting, trades, cleaning, estate agents, restaurants, salons, fitness, property management, veterinary
